note: The daily task writes one queue file per day. fetch_transcripts.py reads files matching YYYY-MM-DD.json, pulls transcripts via the API, and sets each item's status to 'done'.

videos.title: Online Arbitrage Just Got Easier - NEW Sourcing Method
videos.why: Claims a NEW OA sourcing method for the current market; worth transcribing to see if it adds a technique beyond the storefront-stalking / Keepa-PF playbook already in the corpus.

videos.title: How to Find Profitable Amazon Products FAST in 2026 (Reverse Sourcing)
videos.why: Reverse-sourcing / storefront-stalking angle; check whether it details the Keepa-50-storefront + ArbiSource '1-2 punch' workflow surfaced in search, which would be a concrete addition to the sourcing insights.

videos.title: How To Use Keepa for Amazon FBA (New Feature Tutorial)
videos.why: Framed around a NEW Keepa feature; our Keepa corpus is deep but a genuinely new-feature walkthrough (e.g. post-Feb-2026 shipping-in-price change) could update the chart-reading rules.
